textByHash.cabca66fc19b69d9e2e3e48cd847e6189df49eea: 'Ello, and what are you after then?
textByHash.23f6d10c7369b6c80faa3786d55adfcf053ac5a2: I can make an axe for you now, if you wish. Remember, it will be no use for normal woodcutting after I have added the silver edge.
textByHash.2340c11d8c388456de2779f6c58c44afacbeb4b6: Here's a new axe; may it serve you well.
textByHash.3639bbd928e62aee46a19d45f1f26619a3bb8fa1: You'll need to hand over both a mithril axe and holy symbol of Saradomin. You don't have a symbol in your pack, so I'm not able to help.
textByHash.272dd464b657bbd0048672f957fe56141b99acff: You'll need to hand over both a mithril axe and holy symbol of Saradomin. You don't have an axe in your pack, so I'm not able to help.
textByHash.e19a1b3c990b87a06b847f7bc4cf217d4c88d42b: Goodbye then. You may, of course, return if you decide you want a new axe.
